content_body: We loved our time at Serendipity! We had 3 daughters and 3 grandkids with us. The house offered us enough separate spaces so that the grandkids were comfortable and the adults could still socialize after the littles went to bed. The kitchen was well stocked with the cooking tools we needed as we cooked at home for most meals. We would definitely go back!
title: Plenty of Space for All Ages!
